- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: File exists and is updated.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Scope confirmed for CTOA AI Toolkit with 10-agent organization, BRAVE(R) prompt engine, tool advisor scoring, CI approval gate, and training.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Project structure created in current root with all requested folders.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Added agent cards, prompt templates, scoring rules, operating model, policy pack, and workflow definitions.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions specified.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Workspace diagnostics run with no errors.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Task "CTOA: Validate Pack" created and executed successfully.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Launch dry-run executed successfully; core pack files detected and startup checks passed.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README and this file are present and current. HTML comments removed.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
- Never expose internal reasoning or markers such as <think> in user-visible output.
- If a draft contains internal notes, remove them and answer directly instead of narrating the correction process.
- Do not end responses with generic follow-up prompts unless the user asked for options or a decision is actually needed.
- If a response needs correction, make the correction once, briefly, and continue with the task.
